title: More Explosions
description: adds in new ways to create explosions
body:
This mod adds in new ways to trigger explosions using a realistic energy system what this mod does not add in is new explosives (this is not toomuchtnt ;))
ever wished certain things did more damage to the environment well then this mod is for you.
right now the mod uses minecraft's built in explosion system (i tried making my own but it kept lagging and by lagging i mean the game would outright freeze for all intents and purposes)
fortunately or unfortunately the mods internal physics realism means that you wont be able to see any destructive effects from the new "explosion makers" (without going really big) even though there will be a visual explsion effect because i cant change minecraft's particle trigggering system effectively
